titleStmt.title: SII 4.762: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 762. (A.R. No. 309 of 1892). ON A PILLAR IN THE MALLESVARA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ . svasti . sakalaparamavaṁśōdbhava bhāradvājagōtra khaṭvā
ṁgadhvaja vriṣabhalāṁchana kāṁcīpurēśvara kaḍvā[I]paṟegōṣa
ṇa pallavakulatilaka padāṁbujasēvita Annuvakāmaku
lādināAka AnēkabaṁddhujanāśraA noḍivaḍisahasā[¨rjju]
na saṁgrāmarāma samaraikabhīma ḍakkunūḍlaśāsana śrī
veṁggīdēśa cālōkyanaṁkkakāṟa paramaṁḍalasūṟakāṟa
patidēvagurudvijabhaktulu guṟumaṟajamuṁḍaina
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalika gōṁṭūri boddināAku koḍku nāga
dēvaṁḍu bejavāḍa mallīśvaraśrīmahādēvaraku Uyyū
riOdda vīravalli Ācaṁdrā¨rkkaṁbugā niccitimi . sakava¨rṣaṁ
bulu . 1053 nēṁṭi UttarāAna saṁkrāṁttinimittamuna .
grāmasīmā . pū¨rvataḥ [Ā]va sīmā Ø . Ājñētaḥ ḍaggula
pallamu sīmā Ø . dakṣiṇataḥ viddarājuceṟvu nuttaramu
sīmā Ø . nairatyataḥ moṭṭalakōṭaṁ bāsina vāṁgga sī[mā Ø .]
pascimataḥ moṭṭalakōṭa sīmā Ø . vāya vyataḥ Ā kuṁṭasoccina vā
ṁga sīmā Ø . Uttarataḥ kaḍakolani ceṟuvutū¨rppu vāṁgu sīmā
Ø . Iśānyataḥ Āvaṁ galaA bāṟina Oḍikavāṁga sīmā Ø .
kanmēṭi tū¨rppuna pūjārulaku kha 4 .Here begins asuraparaḍḍini ci
timiraḍḍikaṁsēnu bumi puṭṭeṁḍu yiccitimiThe continuation is lost.
kha 1 manikakētireḍḍini marimuttireḍḍi mallira
ḍḍi prōliraḍi vēyē[¨rlla] pōtiraḍḍini Iccitimi
manmaraju tama talli naramadēvulakū taṁ
ḍri dōraparajunakū dha¨rmmavugā nicce .
Digital edition of SII 4.762 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
